title: lespedeza thunbergii var. obtusifolia
intro: Lespedeza thunbergii var. obtusifolia, also known as Chinese bush clover or shrubby bush clover, is a perennial legume native to East Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and red seed pods. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lespedeza thunbergii var. obtusifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Lespedeza thunbergii var. obtusifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a component in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
